rationale: v0c has strongest holdout performance: VC@50=0.3547, NDCG=0.8599. Uses all three signal families (da_rank, density, BF). v0a is stronger on dev VC@50 but weaker on NDCG; v0b is weakest on holdout.

da_rank_norm.description: 1.0 - minmax(da_rank_value). Lower da_rank_value = more binding = higher norm.

right_tail_norm.description: minmax(max(bin_80..bin_110 cid_max)). Higher density = higher norm.

bf_combined_12_norm.description: minmax(bf_combined_12). Higher binding frequency = higher norm.

formula.edge_case: If all values identical in a group (range=0), norm is 0.5 for all rows.
